headline: DA Davidson Maintains Neutral on M&T Bank, Raises Price Target to $235
summary: DA Davidson  analyst Peter Winter   maintains M&T Bank (NYSE:MTB) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $233 to $235.

raw.headline: DA Davidson Maintains Neutral on M&T Bank, Raises Price Target to $235
raw.summary: DA Davidson  analyst Peter Winter   maintains M&T Bank (NYSE:MTB) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $233 to $235.

headline: MTB Q1 Deep Dive: Balanced Loan Growth, Fee Momentum, and Disciplined Capital Moves
summary: Regional banking company M&T Bank (NYSE:MTB) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 6.1% year on year to $2.45 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $4.13 per share was 2.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on M&T Bank, Raises Price Target to $225
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Gerard Cassidy   maintains M&T Bank (NYSE:MTB) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $220 to $225.

headline: M&T Bank Corp (MTB) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Navigating Challenges with Strategic ...
summary: M&T Bank Corp (MTB) reports a mixed quarter with strong fee income growth and strategic share repurchases amid declining earnings.
